notes: Solid, complete Breakout implementation with proper brick collision, paddle angle control, lives, scoring, hi-score persistence, and audio; minor issue is mouse control always overrides keyboard unless a key is held, which can feel awkward, but overall very playable.
Excellent visuals and mouse gameplay, but keyboard controls are broken because the paddle teleports to the mouse position whenever a key is released.

A solid Breakout clone with working core loop and no obvious runtime faults, but mouse overriding keyboard, simplistic collision handling, and some state/control quirks keep it well short of flawless.
